source_policy.fallback: Local Gryphon with safe seeded disbursement data

shots.label: Payment detail with Start Disbursement action
shots.placement: After Schedule Disbursement step 3, after clicking Start Disbursement
redactionNotes: Use demo payment and demo entity only.
Avoid employee names and bank account details.

shots.label: General Setting with Scheduled for selected
shots.placement: After Schedule Disbursement step 7, after selecting Scheduled for and a future date/time
redactionNotes: Use a future demo date within 5 days.
Crop away organisation switcher if it shows a real customer name.

shots.label: Summary showing Disbursement Payment Date
shots.placement: After Schedule Disbursement step 11, after reviewing Summary
redactionNotes: Redact salary totals, quota usage, wallet balance, top-up amount, and employee-sensitive amounts unless demo values are used.

shots.label: Confirm Disbursement modal for scheduled payout
shots.placement: After Schedule Disbursement step 13, when Confirm Disbursement modal appears
redactionNotes: Use demo values only. Redact totals if any real payroll amount is visible.

shots.label: Disbursement list showing Scheduled status
shots.placement: After the paragraph that says the disbursement status shows as Scheduled
redactionNotes: Use demo entity and demo payment.
Redact employee names, entity account data, payroll totals, and payment IDs if visible.

shots.label: Disbursement detail with Reschedule Disbursement action
shots.placement: After Reschedule Disbursement step 4, after opening the scheduled disbursement detail
redactionNotes: Redact payment identifiers and amounts if not demo-safe.
